author: @beforeitsnews
title: President Trump Nominates New Surgeon General | Politics | Before It's News
text:
President Trump Nominates New Surgeon General
President-elect Trump has announced his appointment of Dr. Janette Nesheiwat to be the 22d Surgeon General of the United States. The Surgeon General is the principal assistant to the Assistant Secretary for Heath in the Department of Health and Human Services and the commander of the Commissioned Corps of the US Public Health Service.
Source:
[https://redstate.com/streiff/2024/11/22/president-trump-nominates-new-surgeon-general-n2182381](/v3/r2/?url=aHR0cHM6Ly9yZWRzdGF0ZS5jb20vc3RyZWlmZi8yMDI0LzExLzIyL3ByZXNpZGVudC10cnVtcC1ub21pbmF0ZXMtbmV3LXN1cmdlb24tZ2VuZXJhbC1uMjE4MjM4MQ==)
